---
title: "08. 相生相克与稳定环"
subtitle: "Mutual Generation, Counteraction, and Stable Rings"
date: 2026-04-10
order: 8
categories: [synthesis, cultural, omega]
description: "Cross-text synthesis essay tracing `stableValue_ring_isomorphism` across 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本."
---

**主定理核 / Primary Lean Anchor:** `stableValue_ring_isomorphism`  
**覆盖文本 / Works:** 道德经、易经、孙子兵法、黄帝内经、几何原本

{{< include articles/synthesis_08_ring_arithmetic.md >}}

---

[Back to Synthesis Index](index.qmd) | [Back to Cultural Track](../index.qmd)
